summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 with autonomous tool use and self-correction
DeepSeek releases V4 model with 1M context window and open-sourced weights
onyx v3.2.5 is a release of the onyx framework, with various updates and improvements, including configurable file upload size and token limits
KaLM releases Embedding-V2 with superior training techniques and data
SynapseKit is an open-source Python framework for building LLM applications, designed for speed, simplicity, and scale
ChapsAgents is an enterprise platform for trustworthy agentic AI, enabling full-scale deployments
PolyAI Agent Development Kit brings AI-native development to enterprise customer experience, enabling teams to build and improve AI agents
SAP and Google Cloud expand partnership to deploy multi-agent AI, enabling personalized marketing campaigns
Google launches eighth-generation TPUs, featuring TPU 8t and TPU 8i, for efficient AI model training and inference
Google Cloud commits $750 million to accelerate partners' agentic AI development and adoption
Anthropic releases Opus 4.7 with improved coding and visual tasks capabilities
Release of DenseOn and LateOn, open state-of-the-art single and multi-vector models
Quantum General Intelligence Inc. releases Q-Prime, the world's first commercial quantum embedding model on HuggingFace
Microsoft releases python-1.1.0 of its Agent Framework, adding new features and improvements for building and deploying AI agents
Osirus AI launches a unified platform for building, deploying, and managing enterprise AI agents, featuring a free tier
Agiloft launches Astra, a contracts AI platform with a free tier, for democratizing access to enterprise-grade contract analytics
PBD TokenRouter is a unified platform for accessing AI models, making it easier for organizations to manage AI resources
DSPy 3.2.0 is a release of the DSPy framework, with various updates and improvements, including better support for chaining optimizers
Spice AI releases Spice Cloud v2.0-rc.2 with improved data and AI infrastructure
DR-Venus is a 4B-parameter deep research agent trained on open data, achieving a new small-model frontier on multiple benchmarks
OpenAI releases its internal Agents SDK as an open-source project, featuring a minimalist framework for multi-agent development
NVIDIA Isaac GR00T n1.7-release is a release of the Isaac-GR00T framework, with various updates and improvements
Vercel adds voyage AI provider with embedding and reranking support
Claude Design is a tool for creating prototypes, slides, and visual assets with AI, available as a research preview for subscribers
Qwen3.6-35B-A3B is a sparse MoE vision-language model with 3B active parameters and agentic coding capabilities, open-sourced by the Qwen team
Firecrawl releases an open-source web-agent framework for building and deploying web research agents
Mem0 releases v2.0.0 of its Python SDK, featuring a ground-up redesign of its memory layer for AI agents
ask-dig is a video-centric AI social search platform, delivering evidence-backed answers sourced from social media
Microsoft releases MAI-Image-2-Efficient with 41% lower cost and improved performance
